title: Switchy Pufferfish Skills
description: Adds compatibility between Switchy and Pufferfish Skills
body:
A simple mod to add compatibility between the Switchy mod and Pufferfish's Skills

**FOR SWITCHY UNDER 3.X, TESTED ON 2.9.11**


It works on Neoforge with Sinytra Connector, this is actually how I am using it on my modpack!

It saves skills, skill points, levels/experience and categories, Should work well with attribute skills dont know much about others, for skills that trigger commands, I didnt test it but it probably triggers the command on every switch to the profile with the skill so umm.. yeah

I made this mod so you can have multiple "characters"(Switchy profiles) with different skills and such so you can play different "classes" easily
